title.zh-TW: README/使用文件更新：多庫、已知 ID 使用情境
title.en: README/Usage Document Update: Multiple Workspaces, Known ID Scenario

body.zh-TW: README 和使用文件已更新，說明多庫、已知 ID 使用情境：將 `MEMTRACE_WS` 設定為最常用工作區，並在查詢其他工作區時，每次呼叫工具都帶上 `workspace_id` 參數。
body.en: The README and usage documentation have been updated to describe the multiple workspaces, known ID scenario: set `MEMTRACE_WS` to the most frequently used workspace, and when querying other workspaces, include the `workspace_id` parameter with each tool call.
